column1: # Test prompts for the anthropic/skills library (github.com/anthropics/skills).
# Drives ski's ranker against the 17 skills shipped by the
#   kind = direct      explicit domain words; bag-of-words embedder should nail it
#          task        realistic, indirect phrasing; harder lexically, the bge lane should help
#          confusable  two skills legitimately compete; expected is the dominant one
#          negative    should match NO skill (top score under min_similarity); expected = (none)
# Tune: ski why "<prompt>"                 (shows the full ranked list + scores)
# Lines beginning with # and blank lines are ignored by the runner.
